user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Dyson
Product type: Airwrap hair styling tool
Tone: innovative, premium, empowering
Visual style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance.
Conceptual technique: demonstrative product storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Style in the Air
brief.caption: A sleek, high-gloss bathroom setting where the Dyson Airwrap is elegantly suspended in mid-air, curling a strand of hair effortlessly without touching it, showcasing its innovative technology.
brief.visual_style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance.
brief.typography_style: Futuristic sans-serif with clean lines, echoing innovation
brief.color_scheme: Dyson's signature metallic silver and deep purple accent
